infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Quickpeek needs access to your local network to connect to the Metro development server during development.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: If you turn on location sharing, Quickpeek uses your location so nearby users can find you as a responder.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Quickpeek uses your location in the background to keep your responder status up to date when location sharing is enabled.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: If you turn on location sharing, Quickpeek uses your location so nearby users can find you as a responder.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Quickpeek uses your location in the background to keep your responder status up to date when location sharing is enabled.
